历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 12585→7131→5789→4907→9327, showing an overall trend of moving forward then swinging back; in 2024, due to the split of new Gaokao major groups, the minimum ranking once moved forward to 4907, and in 2025 it swung back significantly to 9327, with large fluctuations in the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 9327; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi for Physics Category was 158 in 2021, 160 in 2022, 113 in 2023, 157 in 2024, and 166 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 130, a decrease of 36 from 2025 (a reduction of about 21.7%), a significant reduction that will intensify competition and push the minimum ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 10th (Top10) in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, making it a top national engineering powerhouse with strong appeal to high-scoring students; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (related to teacher ethics and style incidents), but the impact is limited and no large-scale decline in application confidence has occurred; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 24th overall), with moderate to high attention; no signs of admission breaks in historical admission anomaly records; its strengths include Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, etc., with top national engineering strength highly matched to its admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended with strong social demand; the total number of ordinary Gaokao examinees in Jiangxi in 2026 is approximately 474,900, with Physics Category accounting for about 56% in recent years, estimated at about 267,800, a slight increase from 2025, with a generally stable but tight competitive environment; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province (not the home province), and Jiangxi is not its major source province; in 2025, the university's enrollment share in Jiangxi was about 3.3%, a moderately low level, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 9327, a significant enrollment reduction of about 21.7% in 2026 (pushing the ranking forward), the sustained appeal of the university's top tier and engineering advantages, and the slightly increased number of examinees in Jiangxi, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is expected to move forward significantly to approximately 8113, with a range of 7613–8613.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家『985工程』、『211工程』重点建设高校，入选国家『双一流』建设高校（A类）。学校综合实力雄厚，医学部历史悠久，临床 医学、基础医学等学科具有较高的学术声誉和行业认可度，对江西省优质生源有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等专业尤其受到高分考生青睐。西安交通大学医学部地处古都西安，虽非一线城市，但作为西北地区医 学教育重镇，其医学学科实力和就业前景对江西省考生仍具较强吸引力。2026年医学类在江西省仅招43人，招生规模较小，竞争较为激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合考量2026年医学类计划缩减至43人（较2025年减少2人）的供需变化，以及2025年位次大幅回落后存在回调修复的预期，预测2026年西安交通大学医学类在江西省最低录取位 次约为8878名，较2025年的9327名有所回升（位次数字减小，录取难度增加）。预计录取位次大概率落在8378名至9378名区间内。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Jiangxi Province over the past five years are: 2021: 12585 (planned 48 students), 2022: 7131 (planned 47 students), 2023: 5789 (planned 52 students), 2024: 4907 (planned 46 students), 2025: 9327 (planned 45 students). From 2021 to 2024, rankings continuously rose (numbers decreased), climbing from 12585 to 4907, reflecting increasing popularity of medical programs year by year. However, in 2025, rankings significantly dropped to 9327, a decrease of 4420 places, related to the reduction in planned enrollment to 45 and overall volatility in application choices. In 2026, the enrollment plan further reduces to 43 students (a decrease of 2 students, about 4.44%). A continued reduction in planned enrollment typically means intensified competition, and rankings are expected to rise.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university in the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a national 'Double First-Class' construction university (Class A). The university has strong overall strength, with a long-established medical school. Clinical medicine, basic medicine, and other disciplines have high academic reputation and industry recognition, continuously attracting high-quality students from Jiangxi Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs have seen rising popularity nationwide in recent years, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other specialties particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical school is located in the ancient capital of Xi'an. Although not a first-tier city, as a major medical education hub in the northwest region, its medical discipline strength and employment prospects still strongly attract candidates from Jiangxi Province. In 2026, the medical category plans to enroll only 43 students in Jiangxi, a small enrollment scale, leading to intense competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the supply-demand change of the 2026 medical category plan reduced to 43 students (2 fewer than 2025), and the expectation of a correction rebound after the significant ranking drop in 2025, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Jiangxi Province in 2026 will be approximately 8878, an increase (ranking number decreases, admission difficulty increases) compared to 9327 in 2025. The admission ranking is expected to most likely fall within the range of 8378 to 9378.
